title: Brazilian Chicken Tagine
description: A classic Brazilian-inspired dish made with tender chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine sauce, served with rice.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the tagine spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken broth and coconut milk, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
